issuer.description: The Entity Identifier of the Trust Mark issuer

trust_mark_id.description: The ID of the Trust Mark

issued_on.description: The date and time when the Trust Mark was issued

valid_until.description: The date and time until the Trust Mark remains valid

criteria_uri.description: URI pointing to the criteria that the entity fulfills to obtain the Trust Mark

trust_marks.description: An array of Trust Marks issued by this issuer
